title: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
description: Definition-list (dt/dd) of court closures and alerts with no per-item links; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + Hancock County Superior Court - Ellsworth
  + In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 7 courts, the Hancock County Superior Court will be closed all day to the public beginning Tuesday, July 21st through Friday, July 24th. Monday, July 27th through Friday, July 31st, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon for Administrative Week.
  + Please see the
  + Region 7 Maine eCourts Deployment notice
  + for more information and instructions on how to submit an emergency filing when the court is closed.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
items.content_text:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.

What changed (text excerpt):
Removed:
  - Oxford County Superior Court - South Paris
  - Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the Oxford County Superior Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage.
  - South Paris District Court
  - Beginning on Thursday, July 16th at 2:00 p.m., the South Paris District Court is closed for the remainder of the day due to a power outage.

What changed (text excerpt):
Added:
  + In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 7 courts, the Calais District Court will be closed all day to the public beginning Monday, July 13th through Friday, July 24th. Monday, July 27th through Friday, July 31st, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon for Administrative Week.
Removed:
  - In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 7 courts, the Calais District Court will be closed all day to the public beginning Monday, July 20th through Friday, July 24th. Monday, July 27th through Friday, July 31st, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon for Administrative Week.
